claims.summary: Packet cadence can be clean while the carried semantic experience remains heavy or silted.
claims.disposition: add a typed read-only projection that keeps cadence evidence and semantic-content evidence distinct

claims.summary: Semantic viscosity or residue needs a first-class metric rather than only metaphorical description.
claims.disposition: verify the existing semantic_viscosity, persistence_index, and stagnation_index derivations and expose them in the new distinction packet

claims.summary: A high cadence clarity score must not be allowed to imply that semantic residue is absent.
claims.disposition: add an exact cadence-clear and residue-present regression

claims.summary: Zero pairwise mode overlap can coexist with a felt unified shared pulse.
claims.disposition: verify that fingerprint integrity and the felt-content projection remain separate evidence domains

claims.summary: A deliberate increase in scaffold complexity could test whether felt stability and mode-collision evidence diverge.
claims.disposition: route a non-dispatching fixture replay; do not manipulate live semantic complexity for the diagnostic
